title: PVP-Toggle
description: A pvp-toggle mod, trying to cover Neoforge might expand later, very simple and coded quickly.
body:
# The mod
This modification adds one "command" (/pvp) when ran it will toggle the player's ability to pvp, by default pvp is disabled.  \
\
It saves to disk at ./config/pvptoggle/pvptogglestates.json and saves space by only saving the players who have pvp enabled. \
\
It saves the UUIDs of players so the persistence feature will not work in offline mode (unless under a online mode proxy) and I don't support offline mode other than when using proxies. \
If you want to you CAN use offline mode but beware I will not provide any support for offline mode servers.

I would say this mod is fine for up to 1000 players (depends on how many have PvP enabled). \
Just because this modification is in Alpha doesn't mean it isn't usable!
# Commands
/pvp - Toggles PVP
